name: Variable Groups Demo
shortDescription: Demonstrates the new ProjectVariable and Variable Group input types end-to-end.
longDescription: Reference example for the redesigned variable system. Shows how a single library item can declare a Variable Group schema (InputType: Group) with nested keys plus a Project Variable reference (InputType: ProjectVariable). On deployment, the group is expanded into per-key environment variables (with secret keys delivered via Kubernetes secrets) and the project variable is resolved to its value. The container logs the resolved values so the runtime injection can be verified directly.

Variables.Name: output
Variables.Description: Output topic to write a heartbeat message into.

Variables.Name: LOG_LEVEL
Variables.Description: Logging level for the demo container.

Variables.Name: API_KEY
Variables.Description: Reference to a Project Variable that holds an API key.

Variables.Name: INFLUXDB_CONNECTION
Variables.Description: Variable Group describing an InfluxDB connection. The selected value set's keys are injected as individual environment variables at runtime.
